skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5-120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI video creation agent that handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music for short videos.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: All static findings evaluated as false positives. The skill makes legitimate API calls to Pexo service (https://pexo.ai) for video generation. Backtick commands in documentation are examples, not executable code. Config file access is for user-provided API credentials. Network calls are restricted to known Pexo endpoints. No credential exfiltration or malicious behavior detected.

low_findings.title: Network Access to External Service
low_findings.description: Skill makes HTTPS requests to pexo.ai API. This is intentional design for video generation service integration.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Low confidence - legitimate API client behavior for connecting to video generation service

low_findings.title: Config File Access
low_findings.description: Scripts read ~/.pexo/config for API credentials. User-provided credentials stored locally.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Low confidence - standard credential management pattern for user-provided API keys

low_findings.title: Shell Script Execution
low_findings.description: Skill executes shell scripts (pexo-*.sh) for video creation workflow.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Low confidence - intentional design for shell-based video production workflows

dangerous_patterns.title: Heuristic: Code execution + Network + Credential access
dangerous_patterns.description: Static analyzer flagged combination of shell commands, network calls, and API key access. EVALUATED AS FALSE POSITIVE: This is a legitimate API client pattern. Network calls go to known pexo.ai endpoints only. API key is user-provided for authentication to video service.

content.user_title: Create professional short videos with AI
content.value_statement: Producing marketing videos requires specialized skills and expensive tools. Pexo AI handles scriptwriting, shot composition, and editing automatically. You describe what you want, Pexo creates the video.
actual_capabilities: Create 5-120 second videos with AI (product ads, explainers, social content)
Upload images, videos, or audio as reference material for AI generation
Generate professional scripts and shot compositions automatically
Present preview options for user selection before final render
Handle multi-turn conversations for video revisions
limitations: Requires valid Pexo API key (paid service, credits-based billing)
Cannot crawl web URLs - files must be uploaded directly
Video generation takes 15-20 minutes for standard videos
Cannot access local files without explicit upload by user

use_cases.title: Marketing teams creating product videos
use_cases.description: Quickly generate product showcase videos for e-commerce, ads, or social media. Upload product photos and get professional videos without hiring a video editor.

use_cases.title: Content creators making social media clips
use_cases.description: Transform a video concept into polished TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts. Handles aspect ratio switching and style adaptation automatically.

use_cases.title: Teams producing explainer videos
use_cases.description: Create corporate explainer videos, onboarding content, or tutorial shorts. Just describe the concept and let AI handle the creative work.

prompt_templates.title: Simple video request
prompt_templates.prompt: I want a 15-second product video for [PRODUCT NAME] showing [KEY FEATURE 1] and [KEY FEATURE 2]. Style: [ENERGETIC/CALM/PROFESSIONAL]
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants a basic product video without reference images

prompt_templates.title: Video with reference image
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a [DURATION]-second [STYLE] video using this image as the main reference [ATTACH IMAGE]. Include [REQUIRED ELEMENTS]
prompt_templates.scenario: When user provides a product image for AI to use as visual reference

prompt_templates.title: Video revision request
prompt_templates.prompt: The video at [PREVIOUS VIDEO LINK] is good but please make it more [CHANGE: longer shots/different music/faster pace/better transitions]
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to revise an existing video generation

prompt_templates.title: Batch content creation
prompt_templates.prompt: Create 3 variations of a [CONTENT TYPE] video for [PLATFORM]: A) [VERSION A DESCRIPTION], B) [VERSION B DESCRIPTION], C) [VERSION C DESCRIPTION]
prompt_templates.scenario: When user needs multiple video versions for A/B testing or multi-platform distribution

output_examples.input: Make a product video for running shoes
output_examples.output:
Your video is ready!

Download: https://pexo-assets.oss-us-east-1.aliyuncs.com/projects/xyz/assets/video.mp4

View project: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_123

output_examples.input: Create explainer video about our new app feature
output_examples.output:
Pexo has created preview options for you to choose from:

A) [Preview URL 1]
B) [Preview URL 2]
C) [Preview URL 3]

Which style do you prefer?

best_practices: Be specific about video duration, aspect ratio, and target platform when requesting
Upload reference images or brand assets to ensure consistent visual style
Keep initial requests focused - complex scenes work better as revisions
anti_patterns: Do not add creative suggestions to user requests - copy their words exactly for best results
Do not make API calls during WAIT status - this causes duplicate video generation
Do not truncate signed URLs when sharing - include all query parameters to avoid 403 errors

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Standard 15-second videos take 15-20 minutes. Complex or longer videos may require more time. The skill polls for results and notifies you when the video is ready.

faq.question: What aspect ratios are supported?
faq.answer: You can request 16:9 (YouTube), 9:16 (TikTok/Instagram Reels), or 1:1 (Instagram posts). Default is 16:9 if not specified.

faq.question: Can I use my own images as reference?
faq.answer: Yes. Upload your images using the pexo-upload.sh script, then reference them in your video request. Pexo will use your images as visual references.

faq.question: What file formats are supported for upload?
faq.answer: Images: jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic. Videos: mp4, mov, avi. Audio: mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac.

faq.question: How do I request revisions to a video?
faq.answer: Use the same project ID and send your feedback. The skill will relay your exact words to Pexo for revision. Example: pexo-chat.sh proj_123 'Make the transitions smoother'

faq.question: What is the cost of using Pexo?
faq.answer: Pexo uses a credits-based system. Each video message costs tokens. If credits run out, the skill will show credit balance and a purchase link. Visit pexo.ai/home to buy credits.
